# Reviewer To UI Prep

## Goal

Prepare UI automation from the signed-off canonical baseline.

## Inputs

- `test-cases/canonical-signed-off.md`
- `work/review-loops/canonical-signed-off/loop-summary.md`
- `work/review-loops/canonical-signed-off/snapshots/canonical-signed-off.signed-off.md`

## Guardrails

- Do not add new requirements beyond the signed-off baseline.
- Do not treat UI observations as changes to FT expected behavior.
